steps.title: Recognize an indirect question
steps.content: The wording asked what introduces an embedded question inside a declarative sentence. Embedded questions use statement word order, with the subject before the verb, and the overall sentence takes a period instead of a question mark or exclamation mark.

steps.title: Use statement word order
steps.content: Choice A uses inverted word order and an exclamation mark. Choice B uses statement word order but incorrectly ends the sentence with a question mark. Choice D uses inverted word order and a question mark. Choice C keeps the subject her favorite book before the verb was and ends the declarative sentence correctly. The answer is C.
